title: From Animation To Minecraft
description: This mod contains the weapons and armors from different things like animation about minecraft like the Animation Life and the Annoying Villagers. And about other things that is interesting to be in minecraft like weapons and armors from anime and cartoons.
body:
# To be continued...
Will continue working on finishing the whole one piece outfits and weapons with its abilities. Will upload another version. Trial and error on the abilities. 

Fabric 1.21.1: One Piece things update is work in progress.
Currently trying to add all possible things from One Piece then after that Naruto is the next thing that will be added. In the wiki page, you can see all the possible things that I will be adding. One after another, for now it will be the One Piece things then possibly the Naruto things and so on. After that I will try to update it into the latest version.

![animxmine](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/638d404470f803df2dc6142d167e05e12ca562b6.png)

# Uploaded new Fabric 1.21.1 beta version
Fixed the 3D models of the One Piece things and I added recipes.

Will be putting other recipes in my wiki page and other updates about the models and animation for more cleaner look on this mod page. [From Animation to Minecraft mod Wiki](https://from-animation-to-minecraft.fandom.com/wiki/From_Animation_to_Minecraft_Wiki)

## One of the custom container gui in my resource pack including the custom title. See more in this link [Minecraft X Animation resource pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/minecraft-x-animation-title) (W.I.P for the other containers gui)

![adsw](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/876a1439c72e500c32a00d67c57044127f3b7d58.png)

This mod contains some of the weapons and armors from the animations of famous youtube animators, Squared Media and MrFudgeMonkeyz Studios and from other things related or not related to minecraft.

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

[Squared Media](https://squared-media.fandom.com/wiki/Squared_Media_Wiki)|[Technoblade](https://fcoc-vs-battles.fandom.com/wiki/Technoblade_(Dream_SMP)#With_Equipment)|[Annoying Villagers ](https://annoying-villagers.fandom.com/wiki/List_of_Weapons)

[Minecraft Story Mode](https://minecraft.fandom.com/wiki/Minecraft:_Story_Mode)|[Minecraft Dungeons](https://minecraft.fandom.com/wiki/Minecraft_Dungeons#Items)|[Minecraft Legends](https://minecraft.fandom.com/wiki/Category:Minecraft_Legends)
</details>

[This mod Requires Fabirc API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api/versions?g=1.21.1)

[To see the recipes download JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei/versions?l=fabric)

[For the attack animations download Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat/versions?l=fabric)

[For the enchantment descriptions download this](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchantment-descriptions/versions)

This mod is inspired by two Youtube Animators, Squared Media and MrFudgeMonkeyz Studios and other animations.

I simply collect some resourcepacks that I found throughout the internet and create a mod with it. Some of the models and texture are made and created by me. I added unique effects and abilities to the items. 
Link for the other textures. [Some of the textures can be found here](https://minecraft.novaskin.me/gallery)

The other fabric and forge versions are still pending. I'm the only one who's in this project that's why it will take some time to finish it. Thanks for your patience and hope you'll have fun with my mod.

## Beta version for now
Still work in progress but I thought I should give you the version every time the I fix some issues and add some things for you to test out and have fun until the release version is released.

I'll try to finish atleast one or more of the things that I want to add like for the rest of the week I'll focus on the Minecraft Dungeons things and Minecraft Legends and for next week the One Piece X Minecraft and Garfield X Minecraft then so on until I finish it. Every time I finish one or more group item of the things I want to add i'll upload a version.

## Future features and fixes for Fabric 1.21.1.
Will be uploading daily or monthly Fabric version of 1.21.1 Still work in progress. Still not done fixing some errors and abilities.
  

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Features:
- Adding more One Piece weapons and outfits.
- Adding more Minecraft Dungeons weapons and outfits.
- Adding Minecraft Legends weapons.
- Adding more Annoying Villagers weapons and outfits.
  
Fixes and issues:
- Fixed some enchantments. Work in progress.
- Fixed the mobs not spawning issue. But the animations are still w.i.p. And also for the spawn item; Demoniac Voltage Reaver sword item, Golem Totem sword item and Garfield model item and weapons(unlimited spawn of Swordsman Herobrine) rightclick wisely.
- Added recipes but some are still not craftable. W.I.P
- Added transformable weapons for the Annoying Villagers weapons and shield. W.I.P for the Red Steel Axe when transformed all enchantment and it's durability will reset. And also for the Demoniac Voltage Reaver unlimited spawn of Swordsman Herobrine. !Rightclick wisely!
- Added projectiles; Red-Steel Spear Axe and Hook Gun projectiles(Diamond Sword, Diamond Pickaxe and Enchanted Potato). It's projectile entity still has issues duplicates the projectile, dissappearing when thrown at a mob and it's animations when thrown and colliding to mobs and blocks.
- Added foods but for the Enchanted Potato, which is also a projectile, when consuming it even if you have a full stock it will all dissappear(w.i.p).
- Added 3D hats but doesn't have any armor attributes when equipped but some gives you buffs.
- Fixed the error where it duplicates when the item is equipped. Now currently working on creating a 3D hat

</details>



## One Piece(Some weapons and Outfit) 
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f01b705782394c132024ba30c2541954ea4927c5.png)

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

I created the straw hat and the four katana of Zoro. To be able to equip the katana in your mouth all you need to do is right click while holding your choice of katana. It doesn't have
any abilities yet. I Already fixed the error when equipping but will upload once I added more weapons and outfits from one piece.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a50cfa36bf93763c9fcf816f83e9457321a01ab9_0.webp)

Download BetterCombat mod to display this pose.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a4745a30f56362063a296b685cecbec2a789f25.png)

</details>



## Mobs(w.i.p)
Working on the mobs models and animation. Soon to be added in Fabric 1.21.1. 
I kinda fixed the issue on the mobs not spawning but the animation and other functionalities are not yet fixed. Will soon upload a fixed Fabric 1.21.1 just for you to try it while I improve the animations and it's abilities.

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
Old Golem Totem Entity and Swordsman Herobrine Entity

For the attack animations on both, I'll try again to make the attack animation animate properly cause last time it is not cleanly animated.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/669a41645c46239095cb3731101816cc031cea6b.png)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e3fcf85dec40e75e15eccb84842e4f9254269ef.png)

Also I'll be adding soon a Garfield cat mob. To tame garfield you need to craft a Lasagna. For the recipe of the lasagna still work in progress because of the tomato food item. I'm planning to make the tomato a crop item.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e2048e39bf069d9cba7d6fcf394a0437895cca9.png)

## ModEnchantments(w.i.p)
For the modded items, when enchanting it in the enchanting table it does not give the specific enchant that should only be applied on your chosen modded item.

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce825623b1f3824b2222dc6615c6566dea4ffc45.png)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/08e3f2c9a8f71be6907eba5c722a1fcbf2d057ee.png)

</details>



If you're satisfied with this mod please do share it with your friends. 
If you want to play it in multiplayer both parties need to install this mod.

Feel free to donate too if you want it would be a great help for me as a 4th yr college student. Thankssssss
